name: wasm-spatial-core
description: A high-performance WebAssembly spatial data processing engine for frontend Web3D/GIS applications
author: Qingxi <qingxi@zhiqiweilai.com>

scripts.build:wasm:mt: cd .. && RUSTFLAGS='-C target-feature=+atomics,+bulk-memory,+mutable-globals' cargo +nightly build -Z build-std=panic_abort,std --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release --features multi-thread && wasm-bindgen --target web --out-dir npm/pkg target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/wasm_spatial_core.wasm
scripts.build:wasm:pc: cd .. && wasm-pack build --target web --release --out-dir npm/pkg -- --features point-cloud
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm:pc && npm run build:types
scripts.build:types: cd pkg && npx -p typescript tsc --declaration --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir . index.ts --ignoreConfig --target esnext --moduleResolution bundler --module esnext --lib esnext --skipLibCheck
